notes: CR/LFS rate table: PROC TABULATE categorical+summary, PROC FREQ binomial(level='Y') CL exact 95% CIs, derived daysto1cr/daysto1lfs from rfstdt/crdt/lfsdt dates. External libraw.gml219 replaced by 20-row synthetic GML219 in autoexec with the columns the program reads (rs_ev1/2, ind2fl, crfl, lfsfl, tffl, tftype, rfstdt, crdt, lfsdt). Japanese PROC FORMAT labels transliterated to ASCII for locale-independent listing; TABULATE/FREQ statements and the derivation DATA step are upstream-verbatim.
